summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Crypto Walking with Christ app enhanced features: Battle Mode, Achievements system, and 528 Hz Sabbath Tone component

Territory Alerts panel shows conquest/defense/threat notifications (5 alerts found)
Regional Conquest Status displays all 5 regions (Northeast, Southeast, Midwest, Southwest, West) with rulers and attack status
Donation Momentum shows live velocity rankings with hot/cooling streaks (6 momentum items with LIVE indicator)
Achievements page loads successfully at /achievements route
Achievement tiers display correctly (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Divine - all 5 tiers visible)
Achievement category filters work properly (All, Listening, Streaks, Service, Sabbath, Special - all 6 categories functional)
Achievement cards show progress bars and tier milestones (4 cards with progress bars and 5-tier milestone indicators)
G5 GOLD total display shows correctly
Merchant dashboard loads with proper navigation tabs
Battle Mode sound and alert controls are functional
success_percentage: frontend: 100% - All tested features working correctly
